Steve Jobs was a visionary entrepreneur and innovator. 3. His ideas continue to influence modern technology and design. 4. Apple Inc. introduced products like iPhone and iPad.
questions.explanation: Option A: This gives the sequence 3-1-2-4. Option B: This gives the sequence 2-1-4-3. Option C: This gives the sequence 1-2-4-3. Option D: This gives the sequence 4-3-1-2. **Option B** correctly applies: this sequence forms the most logical, coherent, and grammatically complete sentence.

questions.question: Which of the given options is the most logical sequencing of the following sentences to form a meaningful paragraph? 1. The primary factor in its formation was the Colorado River, which gradually carved through layers of rock, deepening and widening the canyon. 2. The Grand Canyon was formed over millions of years through the combined forces of geological activity and erosion. 3. Weathering from wind, rain, and temperature changes further shaped the canyon's intricate rock formations. 4. Tectonic uplift of the Colorado Plateau increased the river's flow and erosive power, allowing it to cut deeper into the landscape.
questions.explanation: Option A: This gives the sequence 1-3-4-2. Option B: This gives the sequence 3-2-1-4. Option C: This gives the sequence 2-1-4-3. Option D: This gives the sequence 4-3-2-1. **Option C** correctly applies: this sequence forms the most logical, coherent, and grammatically complete sentence.

questions.question: Rearrange the parts of the sentence in the correct order. The economic slowdown P. reducing consumer spending Q. in multiple industries R. straining household incomes and S. has led to job losses
questions.explanation: Option A: This gives the sequence QSPR. Option B: This gives the sequence SQRP. Option C: This gives the sequence PRSQ. Option D: This gives the sequence RSPQ. **Option B** correctly applies: this sequence forms the most logical, coherent, and grammatically complete sentence.

questions.question: Rearrange the parts of the sentence in the correct order. The update P. ensuring security Q. enhanced encryption R. and data autonomy S. across user devices
questions.explanation: Option A: This gives the sequence QRPS. Option B: This gives the sequence PSRQ. Option C: This gives the sequence SPQR. Option D: This gives the sequence QSPR. **Option B** correctly applies: this sequence forms the most logical, coherent, and grammatically complete sentence.

questions.question: Rearrange the following parts (P, Q, R, S) to form the most meaningful and grammatically correct sentence: P. though he lacked international experience Q. was selected for the Olympic squad R. the young shooter S. due to his exceptional performance at the national trials
questions.explanation: Option A: This gives the sequence P S R Q. Option B: This gives the sequence R Q P S. Option C: This gives the sequence R Q S P. Option D: This gives the sequence P R Q S. **Option C** correctly applies: this sequence forms the most logical, coherent, and grammatically complete sentence.

questions.question: Rearrange the parts of the sentence in the correct order. Inflation P. making it difficult for households Q. to manage daily expenses R. affects purchasing power S. and leads to increased cost of living,
questions.explanation: Option A: This gives the sequence QSPR. Option B: This gives the sequence SRQP. Option C: This gives the sequence PQRS. Option D: This gives the sequence RSPQ. **Option D** correctly applies: this sequence forms the most logical, coherent, and grammatically complete sentence.

questions.question: Arrange the parts to form a correct sentence: (1) The exhibition opened to the public. (2) Visitors admired the artworks. (3) Interactive sessions were conducted. (4) Feedback was overwhelmingly positive.
questions.explanation: Option A: This gives the sequence 1-2-4-3. Option B: This gives the sequence 1-2-3-4. Option C: This gives the sequence 2-3-1-4. Option D: This gives the sequence 2-3-4-1. **Option B** correctly applies: this sequence forms the most logical, coherent, and grammatically complete sentence.
